indications.text:
Gleevec (imatinab mesylate) is indicated for the treatment of newly diagnosed adult patients
with Philadelphia chromosome positive chronic myeloid leukemia (CML). Follow-up is
limited. Gleevec (imatinib mesylate) is also indicated for the treatment of patients with

Gleevec™ (imatinib mesylate) is indicated for the treatment of newly diagnosed adult
patients with Philadelphia chromosome positive chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) in chronic
phase. Follow-up is limited.
